name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill or vertical
labels: enhancement

**Proposed skill name**
<!-- kebab-case, e.g. credit-memo -->

**Which vertical does it belong to?**
<!-- financial-analysis / investment-banking / equity-research / private-equity / fund-admin / wealth-management / operations / new vertical -->

**What workflow does it automate?**
<!-- Describe the task a human currently does manually that this skill would handle -->

**Typical inputs**
<!-- e.g. "10-Q filing PDF, analyst model Excel" -->

**Expected output**
<!-- e.g. "8-10 page credit memo covering business overview, financial analysis, risks, and recommendation" -->

**Who uses this in practice?**
<!-- Role + firm type, e.g. "Junior IB analyst at a bulge bracket" -->
